name: Prototype — 4-base map with fully procedural trees + rocks
_doc: 2026-05-12 spatial pass. Map expanded 60→100u to fit 4 base positions at compass extremes (player south, 3 rivals N/W/E) all equidistant 40u from origin. Trees are finite (tree-prototype no-regen, stump on death) and rocks are scenery only — both are PROCEDURALLY GENERATED by main.js _spawnProcedural() from the `procedural` block below over the full ±48u map area. NO exclusions: trees + rocks can spawn anywhere, including on top of bases/cemeteries (pure unfiltered random by design — change seed to reroll). 8 cemeteries (4 cardinal at ±20u midpoints + 4 diagonal at (±25,±25)) create ambush corridors. Rivals start with 1 king (HP 300, stationary) + 3 idle soldiers each. Win = kill all 3 rival kings. Loss = player:died.
entities: _doc 8 hidden cemetery spawn points. 4 cardinal at midpoints between each base and origin; 4 diagonal at (±25,±25) for corner approaches.
_doc 7 idle zombies wandering near the cemetery between player base (z=+40) and origin. First risk on the first wood trip.

_doc Rival KING flags only (soldiers removed 2026-05-12 per user — rival defender AI lands next session). Kings remain as objective markers for the win condition. Without defenders the challenge moves to 'survive the zombie horde to reach each king'.
_proceduralDoc: Both trees AND rocks are now placed at boot by main.js _spawnProcedural(). Change `seed` to reroll the full layout (trees + rocks together). Tune `count` per generator to scale density. Pure unfiltered random — there is NO base / cemetery exclusion: a tree CAN spawn on a king or inside the player ring (collider system pushes things apart on first frame). Map half-extent 48u keeps everything just inside the ±50u world edge.
